results.label: Standard — personal development channel
results.output_summary: 4-week calendar with 4 videos (weekly Tuesdays). Specific working titles for each: e.g., 'Why Motivation Is a Trap (And What Actually Works)' not just 'motivation vs discipline'. Strategic notes explain positioning. Production schedule groups filming by setup similarity and notes weekend filming preference. Next Step: film the morning routine video first, run seo-title-optimizer on it.

A1.note: Table has all required columns with specific working titles, varied formats, and strategic notes.

A2.note: Production schedule present, groups by filming order, accounts for research-heavy topics.

A3.note: 4 videos over 4 weeks matches weekly frequency. Next Step identifies first video and recommends seo-title-optimizer.

results.label: Minimal — only required fields
results.output_summary: 4-week calendar with 8 videos (twice weekly). All slots have specific titles. Formats varied: tutorial, common-mistakes, basics explainer. Production schedule groups videos by complexity. Calendar sequences beginner content early in the month.

A1.note: Full table with specific titles and strategic notes for all 8 slots.

A2.note: Production schedule present with filming groupings.

A3.note: 8 videos matches twice-weekly frequency. Next Step included.

results.label: European context — Vienna classical music channel
results.output_summary: 4-week calendar with 4 videos plus 1 Short. Vienna Philharmonic winter season incorporated in Week 2. Short placed strategically as a teaser for a full tutorial. European cultural context throughout — references Vienna concert halls, EUR ticket pricing. Production schedule notes that the concert video needs to be filmed at or near a Vienna venue.

A1.note: Table with specific titles, formats, strategic notes. Fixed date (Philharmonic season) incorporated.

A2.note: Production schedule accounts for venue access and the Short's relationship to the full tutorial.

A3.note: 5 uploads (4 weekly + 1 Short) matches the frequency goal. Next Step included.
